title: biscutella lima proles nicaeensis
intro: Biscutella lima proles nicaeensis, also known as Nicaean biscuitroot, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Biscutella lima proles nicaeensis include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas to harness its medicinal properties.
